title: viola orientalis
intro: Viola orientalis, also known as the Oriental pansy or Purple pansy, is a flowering plant species in the viola genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Viola orientalis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of colds and fever. Herbal preparations of Viola orientalis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
